name: Grilled Peaches with Raspberry Puree
recipeIngredient: 1/2 (10-oz) package frozen raspberries in light syrup, slightly thawed
2 medium peaches, peeled, halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine raspberries and lemon juice in a container of an electric blender or food processor; cover with the lid, and process until smooth. Strain the raspberry puree; discard seeds. Cover and chill.
2. Cut 1 (18 x 18-inch) sheet of heavy-duty aluminum foil. Place peach halves, cut side up, on foil.
3. Combine brown sugar and cinnamon; spoon evenly into the center of each peach half.
4. Sprinkle with rum flavoring, and dot with margarine.
5. Fold the foil over the peaches, and loosely seal.
6. Place grill rack over medium coals; place peach bundle on the rack. Cook 15 minutes or until peaches are thoroughly heated.
7. To serve, spoon 2 tablespoons of raspberry puree over each grilled peach half.
